ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this issue is associated with */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "debt" TEXT /* Estimated time needed to resolve the issue (in minutes) */,
  "annual_interest" TEXT /* Annual interest cost associated with the issue (in minutes) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full description of the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the issue (e.g., API, Code, Design) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was last modified */,
  "estimated_cost" TEXT /* Estimated financial cost of resolving the issue */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual financial cost incurred in resolving the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team responsible for the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "spent_budget" TEXT /* Amount already spent on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES team_leads ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team lead */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team lead */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team lead */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team lead belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the team lead */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Default severity level for the issue type */,
  "effort_required" TEXT /* Average effort required to resolve issues of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution record */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of how the issue was resolved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (Resolved, In Progress, Deferred) */,
  "estimated_resolution_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of resolution */,
  "actual_resolution_date" TEXT /* Actual date of resolution */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost incurred in resolving the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the comment */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the comment was added */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Whether the comment is private */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the comment is related to a resolved issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, tester) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the attachment is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attachment */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, PNG) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Whether the attachment is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the log entry is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
